mechanics.excerpt: Clearly: this can cramp your style at the worst possible times is up to the gamemaster t0 decide when this trait comes into play; but he should not force the character t0 work constantly for the secret organization_ especially since the other characters in the group will probably be drawn into the missions as well; LEMON Value: There always seems t0 be one vehicle in every unit that is cursed and this time it'$ yours.
